title: Can you name every team in 2025-26 Women's Champions League?
content:
The Women's Champions League league phase starts on Tuesday with 18 teams battling to be crowned European Champions in Oslo, Norway in May 2026.

For this week's big Tuesday quiz we want you to name every single side in this year's league phase - from the multiple winners to the clubs playing in the competition for the very first time.

You have seven minutes to crack this one. Good luck!

Can you name every team to have played in the WSL?

Can you name every team in men's the Champions League?

Quiz: Get to know stars of Women's Cricket World Cup

Fancy testing your memory? Playlast week's quizor go to our dedicatedfootball quizzes pageand sign up for notifications to get the latest quizzes sent straight to your device.
